programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: In South Boston, the state police force are waging an all-out war to take down the city's top organised crime ring.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: Every Which Way But Loose
programme.desc: Philo Beddoe likes beer, brawling and country music. When he falls for a sexy singer, he sets out to win her with Clyde his orangutan in tow.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor finds success, love and frustration when he gets the role of his life, playing a woman.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A magical sword, a notorious assassin, a nobleman's daughter, a breathtaking quest: it adds up to the top foreign language film of all time.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: During WWII, a man persuaded to live on an isolated island and spot aircraft finds himself responsible for a teacher and several students, all female.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: The Man in the Guest House
programme.desc: When a couple converts their garage into a second living space to rent out, they think they've found the perfect source of extra income, but their first renter soon proves to be the worst.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. His boss Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer
programme.desc: As a teen, Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven, but their path takes a dark turn after she has his child and gives her up for adoption.

programme.title: Murder at the Country Club
programme.desc: An assistant manager finds her life in danger when she uncovers corrupt activities at a prestigious country club.

programme.title: Living With My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the murderer, and allows him to work on her property, only to find that the past is not always past.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay at home mother takes in her struggling best friend to help her through a tough time, but soon secrets are revealed that could break her family apart and put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2021 W Indigenous v Maori
programme.desc: The third All Stars game between the Indigenous Women's side and Maori Women's team will be played at Qld Country Bank Stadium in Townsville.

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Sharks v Roosters
programme.desc: The first-placed Sharks had their doubters before rolling Storm in Melbourne. Next up it's the Roosters with Angus Crichton & Sam Walker in red-hot form.

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Rabbitohs v Cowboys

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Warriors v Panthers

programme.sub-title: How to Have a Successful Marriage Part 1

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Let Go And Flow In The Vine Life Pt 3 of 4

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: New Horizons is a teaching series from Gymea Baptist Church, Sydney, presented by Rev Dr Marc Rader.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: Compassion Stories

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods. Come along as Jeni welcomes you into the family.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Jo Bouris and Sarah Harriott are joined by Lize Andrews to discuss perseverance with special guests olympic swimmer Daniel Smith and singer Tarryn Stokes.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Convocation
programme.desc: Weekly Liberty University Campus Convocation services connect students with their Creator through passionate worship and powerful messages firmly rooted in Biblical truth.

programme.title: Beyond the Fire: Resilience
programme.desc: Beyond The Fire: Resilience takes an honest look at the frustrations and triumphs on the road to recovery 3 years after the Black Summer Bushfire Crisis.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike wakes up from a food coma filled with spicy noodles and fancy French fare; a trip downtown sends him flying seven stories off the ground.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: All eight powerhouse women meet together for rock climbing madness. Removing all stigma and comparison to create true sisterhood, this episode showcases to our next generation the power of unity for Mrs Australia Final.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, LOVE is about the different ways we can experience God's wonderful love for us each day.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Twelve deeply practical and intensely personal, powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: TV4DADS: Australian Adventure
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks The Cradle Is The Hand That Rocks The World
programme.desc: TV4Dads host, Brian Molitor explores the beautiful country of Australia, meets with some incredible people, and finds adventure along the way.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: Can one hour a week really change a child's future? In Melbourne, Marion Macaulay proves it can. Through Kids Hope, she's showing how consistent mentorship can be a beacon of hope for young lives.

programme.title: The Listening Road
programme.desc: Captures the story of one man's remarkable journey cycling 3,000 miles across the USA on a mission to engage with people from all walks of life in real conversations about faith, their stories & things that matter most.

programme.title: The Committee
programme.desc: Park Grove Community Church has lost its pastor and is closing its doors unless it reinvents itself. With the help of Chuck, a compassionate visionary whose ideas get the church into perplexing predicaments.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Let Go and Flow in The Vine Life Part 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Monkey Man
programme.desc: A young man embarks on a quest for vengeance against the corrupt leaders who murdered his mother and continue to systemically victimise the poor and powerless.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: An exploratory dive into the depths of the ocean of a research team spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival.

programme.title: Unseen
programme.desc: Sam receives a call from Emily regarding a nearly blind woman who is running from her murderous ex in the woods. She must survive the ordeal with Sam being her eyes using video calls.

programme.title: Revival69: Concert That Rocked the World
programme.desc: When a festival is launched in 1969 to revive the Kings of Rock 'n' Roll, untold events arise during John Lennon's and The Plastic Ono Band's arrival, triggering his decision to leave the Beatles.

programme.title: The Origin of Evil
programme.desc: In France, a woman gets sucked into a world of secrets and betrayal as the battle over her estranged father's massive estate reveals he is more than a genial patriarch.

programme.title: Abigail
programme.desc: A group of would-be criminals kidnaps the 12-year-old daughter of a powerful underworld figure. Their plan starts to unravel when they discover their young captive is no normal little girl.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Focuses on the intensely dramatic and high-stakes responsibilities and decisions that Golda Meir, also known as the Iron Lady of Israel, faces during the Yom Kippur War.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Backpackers Hanna and Liv take a job in a remote Australian pub for some extra cash and are confronted with a bunch of unruly locals and a situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: John Farnham: Finding the Voice
programme.desc: An uplifting documentary about the pop sensation behind Australia's best-selling album of all time.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team must track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity. Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission, not even his team.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: A new security guard for a cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who is he and where has he come from?

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The crime-busting babes are back as they investigate the theft of a database of witness protection profiles. Their prime suspects? A fallen angel and the creepy Thin Man.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: An unsuspecting man, sidelined when his wife asks for a divorce, is taken under the wing of a younger ladies' man who helps him transform his image.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's initial attraction quickly turns sour until they must pretend to be a couple.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Hitch is a cocky and successful date doctor for the unlucky in love, but when he falls for gossip columnist Sara, he forgets his own rules.

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Karen Blixen establishes a plantation in wild and untamed Africa, which is now being threatened by an ensuing war between rival native tribes.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: Spanglish
programme.desc: For John Clasky, life as a celebrity chef means balancing a high-profile career and raising a family. Hiring a housekeeper from Mexico, he quickly learns it may be his life that needs translation.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached - until he meets Lucy.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: A father decides to tell his little girl the story of how he met her mother when she starts asking awkward questions about sex and relationships.

programme.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: High school gets even more awkward when shy teen Ruby Gillman learns that she comes from a royal family of sea krakens and that her destiny is bigger than she ever imagined.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: The Wishmas Tree
programme.desc: A young possum's misguided wish for a white Wishmas freezes her entire hometown of Sanctuary City and threatens all who live there.

programme.title: Stuart Little 3: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: School's out for the summer, and the Little family is spending their vacation at a beautiful lakeside cabin. Stuart can't wait to spend his entire vacation canoeing, hiking and finding his inner scout.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family vacation on a monster cruise ship. While enjoying their time, the unexpected happens when Drac falls for the dangerous captain of the ship.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: High school gets even more awkward when shy teen Ruby Gillman learns that she comes from a royal family of sea krakens and that her destiny is bigger than she ever imagined.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: When a diabolical pirate steals a magical book that contains the secret Krabby Patty formula, SpongeBob and his nemesis Plankton must team up in order to get it back.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure
programme.desc: Two brothers twist the key of a dusty science fiction game, launching Zathura into action and blasting their house into orbit where the board game falls into the hands of some nasty lizards.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: The tale of Wilbur, the very small pig who wants to avoid ending up on the dinner table. Wilbur gets helps from Charlotte, a friendly spider, who assures him this will never happen.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy.

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: After they are attacked by members of a satanic cult, a couple moves house, only to discover that an evil entity has come with them, attaching itself to a vintage doll called Annabelle.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: When an unknown caller puts a bomb in Matt Turner's car, he must complete a series of tasks. With his kids trapped in the back seat, he races to save his family.

programme.title: Terminator: Genisys
programme.desc: As he battles to save the human race, a futuristic soldier sends his right-hand man back to the past in order to protect his mother.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: It's -10 degrees in the Rocky Mountains and the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: A psychological thriller about six strangers who find themselves in circumstances beyond their control and must use their wits to find clues or die.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: A squire with a gift for jousting convinces the great Geoffrey Chaucer to forge papers that will pass him off as a romantic knight.

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: Before she was Wonder Woman, she was Diana, princess of the Amazons. Fighting alongside man in a war to end all wars, she will discover her full powers and her true destiny.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: In the vibrant, sleek 1980s, Wonder Woman will have to muster all her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon butts heads with a new recruit, they must learn to put their differences aside after uncovering a criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: What happens when two fumbling FBI agents disguise themselves as mega-rich princesses to infiltrate high society? It's frantic antics and nonstop hilarity with a side-splitting disco dance-off.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: After years of marriage, Pete and Debbie are approaching a milestone meltdown as they try to balance romance, careers, parents and children in their own hilarious ways.

programme.title: Father Figures
programme.desc: After discovering their father didn't die when they were young, two brothers set off to find him. They end up learning more about their mother than they ever wanted to know.

programme.title: The Cherokee Kid
programme.desc: Young Isaiah Turner will learn from a sharp-shooting wild man, a Mexican national hero and a notorious bank robber.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Benchwarmers 2: Breaking Balls
programme.desc: After his big league dreams are crushed, Ben McGrath is reluctant to take another swing at redemption for his boss' law firm softball team.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, Sonny Koufax is a carefree slob trying to save his love life by becoming responsible. He gets the chance when a cute kid turns up needing a father.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Drillbit Taylor
programme.desc: From the hilarious team that bring you Superbad, three students who are bullied by a guy channelling Hannibal Lecter, hire the cheapest mercenary they can find to fight the forces of evil.

programme.title: Half-Baked: Totally High
programme.desc: Three potheads sell a strain of magical weed to raise funds for their friend's funeral.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: Dear Evan Hansen
programme.desc: In this film adaptation of the Broadway phenomenon, Evan Hansen is an anxious, isolated high-schooler who aches for understanding and belonging amid the chaos and cruelty of the social media age.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: In Love and War
programme.desc: An escaped British prisoner of war seeks shelter in the home of an Italian couple and soon falls in love with their daughter.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Jules realises she's in love with her best friend, who's about to marry someone else. She'll do anything to steal him away, except tell him the truth.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: Dear Evan Hansen
programme.desc: In this film adaptation of the Broadway phenomenon, Evan Hansen is an anxious, isolated high-schooler who aches for understanding and belonging amid the chaos and cruelty of the social media age.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: In this heart-warming story, Georgia is a woman who lives by her own rules and she expects her rebellious granddaughter, to do the same - no is not an option.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: An affluent politician falls for a gorgeous housemaid, thinking she's a guest at the flash hotel where she works, in this rags-to-riches update of the Cinderella story.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A busy journalist embarks on a husband-seeking journey towards self-discovery with the help of two imperfect suitors.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite heroine is back and looking for love in her inimitable style. After finding the perfect boyfriend, her old playboy boss arrives and the fireworks begin.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: In this third instalment, Bridget's single life and career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant and unable to identify her baby's father.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is all geared to make her the perfect assassin, but as she nears her target, she faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: In a terrifying, carefree future, a young man, Guy Montag, whose job as a fireman is to burn all books, questions his actions after meeting a young girl and begins to rebel against society.

programme.title: Everybody's Fine
programme.desc: A retired widower who has planned his first family get-together since his wife's death and is disappointed when his adult children all cancel on him, decides to pay a surprise visit.

programme.title: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A fixer for Capitol Pictures in Hollywood deals with a pregnant starlet, gossip columnists, and a kidnapped movie star, even as he considers an attractive job offer, all in a single day.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When a DC reporter investigates the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is all geared to make her the perfect assassin, but as she nears her target, she faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: Walkout
programme.desc: A teacher becomes a mentor to Chicano high school students protesting injustices in public schools in 1968.

programme.title: The Jack Bull
programme.desc: After being wrongfully denied justice, a horse trader seeks his own justice on a treacherous rancher.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: A former would-be baseball superstar is now general manager of the Oakland A's team, who brings in a Yale-educated economist to chart their path to success.

programme.title: Blow
programme.desc: The true story of George Jung who moved a mountain of cocaine into the USA for Pablo Escobar's Medellin cartel, made $100 million, wound up doing 15 years in jail and blew the lot.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: One man will rise above his challenges and prove that determination, courage, and love are more important than ability.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Gandhi
programme.desc: His goal was freedom. His strategy was peace. His weapon was humanity. This film is an epic masterpiece that traces the historic steps of this revered man.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Matt and Christina Drayton are a couple whose attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiance who is black.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: America's grooviest family are back in this big-screen adaptation of the long-running television series. The Bradys must save their home from foreclosure after a tax delinquency notice.

programme.title: Up In Smoke
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the police academy will be open to any and all applicants.

programme.title: Jaws 3
programme.desc: When a young great white shark gets into a theme park, the manager keeps it for a new exhibit. But he didn't expect the angry mother to turn up looking for it.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 2
programme.desc: Police rush to the Murdaugh home after Alex Murdaugh reports his wife, Maggie, and son Paul dead. With police and press digging into Alex's life for leads, he attempts to derail their investigation.

programme.title: The Paramedic Who Stalked Me
programme.desc: After a deadly accident, a young woman becomes the target of an obsessed EMT worker who saved her life.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate is looking for the perfect match online when she swipes and meets Walker, a wealthy jet-setting art dealer. After Kate falls for the dashing dealer, she learns the dark truth about him.

programme.title: Husband, Wife and Their Lover
programme.desc: A sexually charged thriller about Franklin and Bridget, a married couple in trouble.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Having been jilted at the altar, a literary aide to a controversial author thinks nothing of a fleeting liaison with a man she meets on a business flight.

programme.title: You Can't Escape Me
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is finally done with her abusive husband. She knows she must start over. She thinks she is safe in Portland with a friend, but she finds herself in danger.

programme.title: Maid for Revenge
programme.desc: When a struggling young maid wakes up next to her client's pool covered in blood, she discovers the owner dead in the water and her eight-year-old son's life is in jeopardy. Inspired by true events.

programme.title: Engaged to be Murdered
programme.desc: Amanda will stop at nothing to keep her son Jackson from marrying Olivia, who she believes is after his money.

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.desc: Desperate to save her idyllic life and marriage, Laura's mysterious past begins to emerge, and with it paranoid delusions that pose a serious threat to anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex Murdoch's family's hidden crimes begin piling up as he attempts to conceal his own financial felonies but falls into a dark spiral.

programme.title: Nanny Dearest
programme.desc: Ex-con Taylor tracks down a married couple who received one of her eggs 10 years ago. She becomes fixated on their daughter and will stop at nothing from becoming a mother again.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: Amish Witches: Story of Holmes County
programme.desc: A reality TV crew moves into Holmes County, Ohio, to document the lives of an isolated sect of Swartzentruber Amish. Production is halted by the death of a Brauchau, an Amish witch.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Harry and Meghan: Escaping the Palace
programme.desc: The couple decide to step back from the duties of the British monarchy following the birth of their son Archie.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Shane Settel starts to believe in fate after a chance tarot reading. He has the largest success in his professional career and falls in love, but then tragedies begin to follow him.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: A small-town minister is accused of the deaths of two beloved parishioners when evidence surfaces that the family wasn't quite as perfect as they appeared.

programme.title: Woman with the Red Lipstick
programme.desc: Lucy and her boyfriend assume fake names and roleplay meetings for the first time. Later, Lucy sees a news report about a missing persons case where the victim has the same name.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached - until he meets Lucy.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: An uptight English writer's book is a failure but a hit in Mexico. When he's invited there to promote it, he discovers his Spanish translator has rewritten his book as an erotic novel.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: A humorous, intertwining tale of love won and lost when Cupid strikes on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.title: The High Note
programme.desc: Set in the dazzling world of the LA music scene comes the story of Grace Davis, a superstar whose talent, and ego, have reached unbelievable heights.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams but has to ask his loyal assistant to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a lie.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Hitch is a cocky and successful date doctor for the unlucky in love, but when he falls for gossip columnist Sara, he forgets his own rules.

programme.title: Sex and the City
programme.desc: Carrie Bradshaw, a successful author, and her fashion icon friends continue to juggle jobs and relationships while navigating motherhood, marriage and Manhattan real estate.

programme.title: Single White Female
programme.desc: A woman's ad for a female tenant opens the door to unrelenting terror. She takes over her spare room, her boyfriend and her identity.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: In this visually stunning musical, a small-town singer moves to the big city for her chance at stardom and becomes enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: A mother who suspects a cover-up over the poisoning of a town's water supply single-handedly takes on a powerful California power company.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Primo
programme.desc: Adapted from the seminal memoir of Holocaust survivor Primo Levi, this one-man drama tells of how Italian-Jewish chemist Levi was captured and sent to Auschwitz, giving details of the horrendous life in the camps.

programme.title: The Late Shift
programme.desc: The battle for the Tonight Show hot-seat; one of the most brutally contested and hilarious battles in television history.

programme.title: Honey Boy
programme.desc: From a screenplay by Shia LaBeouf, based on his own experiences, brings to life a young actor's stormy childhood and early adult years as he struggles to reconcile with his father.

programme.title: Manchester by the Sea
programme.desc: A depressed man is forced to return to the community where he was born and raised after his older brother suddenly passes away.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: A mother who suspects a cover-up over the poisoning of a town's water supply single-handedly takes on a powerful California power company.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Falcone
programme.desc: Determined to break the reign of the Mafia in Italy, Giovanni Falcone, a brave lawyer, dared to challenge the Cosa Nostra. This is his story.

programme.title: About Schmidt
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Jack Nicholson stars as Warren Schmidt, an embittered man who has just retired after 32 years as an insurance company actuary and is about to taste a not so sweet slice of life.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: A UN interpreter overhears an assassination plot. When a Secret Service agent delves into the case, he begins to question whether she is a victim, or a suspect.

programme.title: Last Night In Soho
programme.desc: Edgar Wright's psychological thriller follows a young woman mysteriously able to enter the glamorous 1960s, where the dreams of the past splinter into something darker.

programme.title: Se7en
programme.desc: Two cops track a brilliant and elusive killer who orchestrates a string of horrific murders.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Following a mystery treasure map into a spectacular underground world, the Goonies fight a developer out to flatten their homes.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: A quiet banker, wrongly accused of murder, is sentenced to life in a brutal prison. He maintains hope amid despair with the help of a fellow prisoner.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: A self-centred TV weatherman is caught in a personal time warp, forced to relive one strange day over and over again. The jokes explode in this marvellously inventive and offbeat comedy.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Following a mystery treasure map into a spectacular underground world, the Goonies fight a developer out to flatten their homes.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: Memphis Belle
programme.desc: In 1943, the crew of a B-17 based in the UK prepares for its 25th and final bombing mission over Germany before returning home to the USA.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Wrapped Up In Christmas
programme.desc: Heather's niece Molly asks the mall Santa to help find a boyfriend for her aunt. The mall Santa is just a substitute filling in, and is a lawyer turned artist called Ryan. Will Molly's wish come true?

programme.title: Let's Get Physical
programme.desc: A fitness instructor leads a double life, running a prostitution ring with a client list. Sadie receives an anonymous tip and soon after her studio is raided by authorities.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dimwitted, blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia.

programme.title: A Sister's Nightmare
programme.desc: Police officer Jane Rydert's life goes into a tailspin the day her older sister Cassidy shows up at her door after 16 years of confinement in a psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: Trapped in the Farmhouse
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive boyfriend seeks shelter from a terrifying storm in an isolated farmhouse, unaware that something far worse is waiting for her inside.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: When Jessica is falsely charged with the murder of her friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her husband Matt in an attempt to clear her name.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a celebratory trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George is murdered. Allie must uncover family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.
